name: Kintavar Exploration Inc.
summary: Kintavar Exploration Inc. engages in the acquisition, assessment, exploration, and development of gold and base metal mineral properties in Canada. Its flagship project is the 100% owned Mitchi copper property that covers approximately 30,083 hectares located in the north-western portion of the central metasedimentary belt of the Grenville geological province. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Boucherville, Canada.
